PROJ_1774629364410.title: Hallowed Be Thy Name
PROJ_1774629364410.rawText:
[Em||Intro]I'm waiting in my cold cell when the bell begins to chime
Reflecting on my past life and it doesn't have much time
[C]'Cause at five o'clock they [D]take me to the gallows [Em]pole
[C]The sands of time for [D]me are running [Em]low [C]	[D]
Running low, yeah

[Em||Interlude	1]	[C]	[D]	[Em]

[Em||Verse 1]When the priest comes to read me the last rites [B5]	[C5]
Take a look through the bars at the last sights [A5]	[D5]
Of a world that has gone very wrong for me [Em]	[B5]	[C5]
[Em]Can it be that there's some sort of error? [B5]	[C5]
Hard to stop the surmounting terror [A5]	[D5]
Is it really the end, not some crazy dream?[Em] 	[B5]	[C5]

[Em||Verse 2]Somebody please tell me that I'm dreaming
[C5]It's not easy to stop from screaming
[D5]But words escape me when I try to speak [Em]	[B5]	[C5]
[Em]Tears fall, but why am I crying?
[C5]After all, I'm not afraid of dying
[D5]Don't I believe that there never is an end? [Em]	[B5]	[C5]

[Em||Instrumental	Break]	[C]	[D]	[Em]
[Em]	[Em]	[C]	[C]
[Em]	[Em]	[C]	[C]
[Em]	[Em]	[C]	[C]
[Em]	[Em]	[C]	[C]

[Em||Verse 3]As the guards march me out to the courtyard
[C]Somebody cries from a cell, "God be with you"
[D]If there's a God, why has He let me [Em]go?
As I walk, my life drifts before me
[C]And though the end is near, I'm not sorry
[D]Catch my soul, it's willing to fly a[Em]way

[Em||Verse 4]Mark my words, believe my soul lives on
[C]Don't worry now that I have [D]gone
I've gone beyond to seek the [Em]truth
When you know that your time is close at hand
[C]Maybe then you'll begin to understand
[D]Life down here is just a strange illu[Em]sion

[Em||Solo]	[Em]	[C]	[C]
[Em]	[Em]	[Em]	[Em]
[C]	[C]	[Em]	[Em]
[Em7]	[C]	[D]	[Em7]	[C]	[D]
[Em]	[Em]	[D]	[D]
[Em]	[Em]	[D]	[D]
[Em]	[Em]	[D]	[D]
[Em]	[Em]	[D]	[D]
[Em]	[Em]	[D]	[D]
[Em]	[Em]	[D]	[D]
[Em]	[Em]	[G]
[Em]	[Em]	[G]
[Em]	[Em]	[G]
[Em]	[Em]	[G]
[Em]	[C]	[D]	[Em]
[Em]	[C]	[D]	[Em]	[B5]	[C5]

[Em||Outro]Yeah, yeah, [C5]yeah [D5]Hallowed be thy [Em]name
[Em]Yeah, yeah, [C5]yeah [D5]Hallowed be thy [Em]name
[D]Yeah [C]	[D]	[Em]

[C]So when you're waiting for the next at[D]tack
[Em]You'd better stand, there's no turning [D]back
[Em]The bugle sounds, the charge be[D]gins
[Em]But on this battlefield, no one [D]wins
[C]The smell of acrid smoke and horse's [D]breath
[Em]As I plunge on into certain death

[Em]The mighty roar of the Russian [D]guns
[C]And as we race towards the human [D]wall
[Em]The screams of pain as my comrades [D]fall
[Em]We hurdle bodies that lay on the [D]ground
[Em]And the Russians fire another [D]round
[C]We get so near, yet so far a[D]way
[Em]We won't live to fight another day

[Em||Verse 3]We get so close, near enough to [D]fight
[Em]When a Russian gets me in his [D]sights
[C]He pulls the trigger and I feel the [D]blow
[Em]A burst of rounds takes my horse be[D]low
[Em]And as I lay there, gazing at the [D]sky
[Em]My body's numb and my throat is [D]dry
[C]And as I lay forgotten and a[D]lone
